rows.label: tlk45370152_03_msg0002
rows.name:
If this ceasefire holds,
we can cut military spending!

rows.label: tlk45370152_03_msg0003
rows.name:
Then if we solve the
anti-Empire problem,
my stress will ease too!

rows.label: tlk45370152_03_msg0004
rows.name:
Ah! [ML:Dash ]Ahem! N-nothing!
I was just muttering
about the budget review!
